Landing.description: Todara is your boutique personal space, watched over by Sofi, designed to reach your full potential without losing elegance.
Landing.feat1Desc: Seamless interface built on Next.js 15 and Neon DB for an instant response.
Landing.feat2Desc: Classify your projects into folders with exclusive colors for your workflow.
Landing.feat3Desc: Your data is sacred. Encryption and absolute control in every task.

About.description: Todara wasn't born to be "another" task app. It was born to be your digital sanctuary. We believe an organized mind deserves a beautiful environment.
About.sofiDesc: More than a mascot, Sofi is your success barometer. Inspired by the noble vigilance of the Schnauzer, she lives and breathes with your productivity. Her mood reflects your commitment to your own goals.
About.missionDesc: We want to eliminate digital noise. We combine technical power with a minimalist interface so your only worry is creating, not managing.

Privacy.subtitle: Your peace of mind is our highest quality standard.
Privacy.sec1Desc: To operate Todara efficiently, we exclusively collect information provided by your identity providers (Google or GitHub): full name, email address, and avatar. We do not track your activity outside our platform or collect biometric or sensitive data.
Privacy.sec2Desc: Your data and tasks are securely stored in high-tech servers that comply with international security standards (SOC2, ISO 27001). We never share or sell your information to advertisers.
Privacy.sec3Desc: As a Todara user, you have the absolute right to access, rectify, or delete your data at any time. By deleting your account from settings, our system permanently deletes all your information from our servers.
Privacy.cookiesDesc: We use strictly necessary technical cookies to keep your session active. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.

Terms.subtitle: Clear rules for an impeccable workflow.
Terms.sec1Desc: By accessing Todara, the user agrees to be bound by these terms of service. This software is provided "as is", focused on managing personal tasks. The visual assistant (Sofi) has a purely aesthetic and motivational function.
Terms.sec2Desc: Todara uses cutting-edge technology to ensure service availability. However, we are not responsible for data loss resulting from external service failures or user negligence. It is recommended not to store critical, financial, or sensitive medical information on the platform.
Terms.sec3Desc: All visual components, mascot animations, and software architecture are the property of Todara. Total or partial reproduction for commercial purposes without express authorization is prohibited.

Offline.title: Sofi lost the signal
Offline.description: We need an internet connection to sync your tasks securely.

NotFound.title: 404 Error.
NotFound.subtitle: Sofi can't find this page!
NotFound.desc: It seems you've lost your way. Todara's Schnauzer looked everywhere, but there's nothing here.

Tasks.title: My Tasks
Tasks.description: Manage your productivity. You have {count} pending.
Tasks.emptySubtitle: Everything is up to date, Sofi is happy!

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your preferences and your Todara account identity.
Settings.profileDesc: Information linked to your access account.
Settings.appearanceDesc: Customize how you interact with Todara.
Settings.colorModeDesc: Toggle between light or dark mode.
Settings.languageDesc: Change the platform language in real time.
Settings.secureSessionDesc: Your session is protected. Upon signing out, you will need to use a new Magic Link.

Categories.title: My Folders
Categories.description: Organize your projects in custom spaces.
Categories.emptyState: You don't have any folders yet. Create one to start organizing your life.

CategoryDialog.title: Create Folder
CategoryDialog.description: Give your new project a unique identity.
CategoryDialog.toastError: There was a problem creating the folder

Auth.legalStart: By continuing, you agree to our
Auth.verifySubtitle: We have sent you a magic login link.
Auth.verifyDesc: Click the button in the email to sign in. If it doesn't appear, wait a minute or check your spam folder.
Auth.errorDesc: A technical problem occurred. Please try again or use another method.

Calendar.title: Calendar
Calendar.description: Visualize all your tasks over time.

CookieBanner.title: Cookie Usage
CookieBanner.description: We use strictly necessary technical cookies to keep your session active and secure. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

Metadata.title: Todara | Productivity is an Art
Metadata.description: Organize your life with style. Todara is your boutique personal space, watched over by Sofi, designed to reach your full potential.

Installation.title: Todara on all your devices
Installation.description: Our PWA technology allows you to install Todara without going through the App Store.
Installation.step1Desc: Look for the 'Install' icon (⊕) in the Chrome or Edge address bar.
Installation.step2Desc: Tap 'Share' and then choose 'Add to Home Screen'.
Installation.offlineDesc: Sofi saves your tasks even if you lose connection. They will sync with the cloud as soon as you are back online.
